title: Mid-semester exam schedule released
content: The mid-semester examination timetable has been published on the academic portal. Students are advised to check their department pages for room allocations. Any clashes should be reported to the exam cell before July 5th.

title: Library extended hours during exam week
content: The central library will remain open until 2 AM starting next Monday to support students preparing for mid-semester exams. ID cards will be required for entry after 10 PM.

title: Hostel Wi-Fi maintenance on July 3rd
content: Network infrastructure upgrades will take place across all hostel blocks on July 3rd between 1 AM and 5 AM. Expect intermittent connectivity during this window.

title: Change in mess menu - feedback requested
content: Based on student council feedback, the mess committee is trialing a revised weekly menu starting next week. Please fill out the feedback form linked on the notice board after trying it for a few days.

title: Placement pre-registration opens
content: Pre-registration for the upcoming placement season is now open for final year students. Resumes must be uploaded to the placement portal by July 15th. Format guidelines are available on the portal.

title: Guest lecture series - Systems Design
content: The CS department is hosting a three-part guest lecture series on distributed systems design, delivered by alumni working in industry. Attendance is optional but recommended for interested students.

title: Sports complex closed for resurfacing
content: The outdoor basketball and tennis courts will be closed for resurfacing work from June 30th to July 10th. The indoor badminton courts remain open as usual.

title: Scholarship application deadline extended
content: Due to a high volume of requests, the merit scholarship application deadline has been extended by one week. The new deadline is July 8th, 11:59 PM.

title: Lost and found - items from Fest week
content: Several items were handed in to the security office following last week's fest. Students can check the list on the admin block noticeboard and claim items with valid ID.

title: New elective courses open for registration
content: Two new electives, Applied Cryptography and Human-Computer Interaction, have been added to the course catalog for the upcoming semester. Seats are limited and allotted on a first-come basis.
